description: Poster. The upper portion shows a small white line-engraving of the White House and the words 'The WHITE HOUSE'. Below in a large navy serif typeface (centered) is the slogan 'HOMES ARE FOR PEOPLE, NOT CORPORATIONS.' followed by a smaller all-caps line 'PASS THE 21ST CENTURY ROAD TO HOUSING ACT'. The lower two-thirds is a golden-hour color photograph of a coastal neighborhood: large shingled waterfront homes behind a rocky shoreline, with a tall flagpole flying a large American flag at center and calm water in the foreground.
notable_text: HOMES ARE FOR PEOPLE, NOT CORPORATIONS. / PASS THE 21ST CENTURY ROAD TO HOUSING ACT
